data.title: Paralyzed Veterans of America offers free fitness program for vets with mobility challenges, in partnership with Warrior Strong.
data.description: Last week, the Paralyzed Veterans of America introduced the Online Fitness + Wellness Program, a virtual adaptive fitness and wellness initiative in partnership with Warrior Strong. This program is tailored for veterans who have spinal cord injuries. It is available for free and aims to cater to the unique needs of veterans facing such challenges. The program was launched in Washington D.C. on January 12, 2026, and is expected to reach a significant number of veterans in need of specialized fitness and wellness resources.

data.title: 5WPR chosen as agency of record for FanArcade, a gamification platform in the U.S., effective Jan. 12, 2026.
data.description: In a press release on January 12, 2026, 5WPR, a leading PR and digital marketing company in the United States, revealed their new partnership. The firm has been chosen as the agency of record for FanArcade, a web-based gamification agency. FanArcade specializes in providing gamification services for brands, artists, and athletes. This partnership signifies a significant achievement for 5WPR.

data.title: Cardamom® receives minority investment from Valspring Capital to fuel growth in health IT services.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, a technology-forward health IT professional services company called Cardamom® in Madison, Wisconsin disclosed a minority investment from Valspring Capital. The investment aims to support Cardamom's growth and expansion in the areas of data, analytics, AI, and applications. Cardamom, a minority-owned company, focuses on these services and plans to utilize the investment to bolster its operations and reach a broader market.

data.title: CallTrackingMetrics rebrands to CTM, focusing on AI innovation and enterprise growth. New identity, AI capabilities, and product expansion.
data.description: A company specializing in conversation analytics revealed a new identity and enhanced AI capabilities as well as expanded product offerings. CTM, previously known as CallTrackingMetrics, shared the news on January 12, 2026. The company is based in Millersville, Maryland and is recognized globally for its analytics services. This rebranding marks an important milestone for CTM as they strengthen their enterprise-grade AI features and broaden their product range.

data.title: Mr Gatti's Pizza introduces Kick'n Chicken Bacon Ranch Pizza at a value price for ranch lovers in the new year.
data.description: In Dallas on January 12, 2026, the well-known Texas-based pizza and entertainment company, Mr Gatti's Pizza, has unveiled The Kick'n Chicken Bacon Ranch Pizza, catering to fans of ranch flavors. This new menu item offers a delectable taste at an excellent price point in the coming year. The pizza is being presented as a limited-time offer and is expected to attract a wide audience with its unique blend of flavors.

data.title: Capital Hilton celebrates America's 250th year with yearlong campaign in Washington, D.C. featuring history-themed events and special offers.
data.description: In Washington, D.C., Capital Hilton, a renowned historical landmark, is marking a significant year with a range of activities, including seasonal events, immersive experiences, and special guest offerings. Situated in the heart of the city, Capital Hilton is introducing these initiatives to commemorate its rich history.

data.title: Trailhead Biosystems raises $20M, bringing total funding to $40M for commercializing iPSC-derived products.
data.description: An infusion of $20 million in funding is propelling the commercialization of Trailhead's iPSC-derived human cell and media products at an accelerated pace. Based in Beachwood, Ohio and Cambridge, Massachusetts, Trailhead Biosystems Inc. is at the forefront of the biotechnology industry. The additional financial support will enable the company to further develop and market its innovative products, solidifying its position as a leader in the field. The funding boost, announced on January 12, 2026, reinforces Trailhead's commitment to advancing human cell technology and expanding its market reach. Visit www.trailbio.com for more information on the company's groundbreaking work.

data.title: StimLabs® and Geistlich to launch new product in Q2 2026 following expanded partnership started in 2024.
data.description: Roswell-based StimLabs revealed today an extended collaboration with Geistlich, a prominent player in regenerative medicine. The partnership, originating in 2024, initially included an exclusive national distribution deal to offer their products.

data.title: BitGo aims to raise $201M in US IPO, eyeing a $1.96B valuation with $90B+ assets under custody, backed by top US banks.
data.description: Blockchain security firm BitGo is aiming to generate up to $201 million through an initial public offering (IPO), with a projected valuation of $1.96 billion. The company boasts holding over $90 billion in assets under custody, with major US banks spearheading the transaction.

data.title: SKYX to provide technologies for luxury waterfront smart home community in North Carolina, expanding market presence.
data.description: SKYX has revealed plans to provide its cutting-edge technologies for the creation of a new upscale waterfront smart home community in North Carolina. The project will feature state-of-the-art amenities, including advanced security systems, energy-efficient smart devices, and high-speed internet connectivity. This development is set to consist of a total of 150 luxury homes, each equipped with the latest smart home innovations. The partnership between SKYX and the real estate developers aims to offer residents a seamless and modern living experience.

data.title: Ampersand launches TrueStream Political for authenticated, scalable voter reach across multiscreen platforms. NY, Jan. 12, 2026.
data.description: Ampersand, a leading TV advertising sales and technology company, has introduced TrueStream - a comprehensive platform catering to political advertisers aiming for verified and broad voter engagement through quality multiscreen platforms. The launch was revealed on January 12, 2026, in New York City.
Ukraine MP: 'The Verkhovna Rada Committee on Digital Transformation supported the resignation of Mykhailo Fedorov from the position of First Deputy Minister of Digital Transformation.'

data.title: CloudMasonry launches Data & AI practice led by Landon Harris to help clients leverage data, AI, and analytics for growth.
data.description: A prominent Salesforce consulting partner has broadened its cross-cloud offerings to aid customers in leveraging data, AI, and analytics for organizational change and development. On January 12, 2026, in Chicago, CloudMasonry revealed its enhanced capabilities. This initiative aims to assist clients in utilizing advanced technologies to boost their growth. You can find more information on CloudMasonry's website: https://cloudmasonry.com.

data.title: KeepZone AI Inc. plans to revolutionize homeland security with AI-driven solutions amid rising global threats. Jeffs' Brands expanding into this sector.
data.description: Tel Aviv, Israel, January 12, 2026 - With global security threats growing more complex, the demand for cutting-edge AI-driven homeland security solutions is at an all-time high. KeepZone AI Inc., a subsidiary of Jeffs' Brands Ltd (Nasdaq: JFBR, JFBRW), has been established to expand Jeffs' Brands' operations beyond date-driven e-commerce into the global homeland security sector. KeepZone's goal is to create integrated systems using advanced AI technology to tackle modern challenges like border security, protecting critical infrastructure, and ensuring public safety. Jeffs' Brands is making a strategic move into this sector to combat evolving security threats effectively.

data.title: Elation Health partners with Anthropic to provide AI-powered Clinical Insights for primary care, enhancing clinician preparation for visits with fast, cited chart summaries.
data.description: In San Francisco, Elation Health revealed that Anthropic's AI assistant, Claude, is now integrated into its Clinical Insights solution, a tool aimed at enhancing primary care. This collaboration enables clinicians to quickly access cited chart summaries to aid in visit preparation within seconds. Anthropic, a prominent AI research and development company prioritizing responsible AI, provides Claude's efficient and comprehensive reasoning capabilities for Clinical Insights.

data.title: Planet Labs signs 9-figure deal with Sweden, providing satellites and data for peace and security operations.
data.description: In San Francisco, Planet Labs PBC revealed a significant multi-year deal amounting to a low 9-figure sum with the Swedish Armed Forces. The agreement aims to promptly provide a range of satellites, space-focused data, and awareness solutions to aid the nation’s peace and security efforts. This development signifies Planet’s third Satellite Services contract within a year, highlighting a strong interest in the company’s quick and pioneering space technologies.

data.title: SecurityBridge CEO transitioning for global expansion, Jesper Zerlang named CEO from Jan 1, 2026, backed by BU Bregal Unternehmerkapital. #Cybersecurity
data.description: In INGOLSTADT, Germany, SecurityBridge, a top cybersecurity solutions provider for SAP, has named Jesper Zerlang as the new Chief Executive Officer starting January 1, 2026. Zerlang, who previously served as Chairman of the Board for 12 months, will lead the company through its global expansion phase. This move follows support from funds advised by BU Bregal Unternehmerkapital (BU). SecurityBridge specializes in safeguarding SAP environments for large corporations.

data.title: Diana Shipping Inc. announced time charter for m/v DSI Altair with Bunge at a rate of $14,750/day until March 30, 2027.
data.description: In Athens, Greece, on January 12, 2026, Diana Shipping Inc. (NYSE: DSX) announced a new time charter contract for one of its Ultramax dry bulk vessels, the m/v DSI Altair, through a wholly-owned subsidiary. The contract was signed with Bunge SA, Geneva, at a gross charter rate of US$14,750 per day, with a 5.00% commission to third parties. The charter will be effective from January 17, 2026, until at least January 15, 2027, and could potentially extend up to March 30, 2027.
